text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is over. There's a slight hint of
autumn in the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have to head back to the academy and start
preparing for the autumn races.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whew. The beginning kinda sucked... but it
turned out to be a nice and lazy summer in the
end.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like the weight that's been buildin' up inside
me since my debut has all been washed away.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Wanna start workin' toward my
autumn goal?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah, but more than just the race itself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You know that certain someone who's always
gettin' on my nerves? I think she'll be in the Shuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Remember what she said at the end of
spring?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
While you're recovering from your setback, I'm
going to be getting stronger! I'll be so strong that
you'll definitely want to run against me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Just wait until fall. I'm not letting you off the hook. Or more like, you'll be begging to race me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
She's the one who threw down the gauntlet, so
she's definitely gonna bring a good fight.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet keeps callin' herself "number one" for a
reason.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And I... wanna see what that reason is.
choice_data_list: So you want to practice hard for her?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I guess... But I kinda want this for myself
too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I was super cool at the Derby. But, then I really
screwed up afterwards, which was super lame.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get a fresh start this autumn! I'm lookin'
for somethin' even cooler than the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And I sorta feel like Scarlet's the one who'll show
me what that "something" is.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We're different now than we were in the spring. I
wanna start this season off by racing against her.
